raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The paper frames instruction-following as the dominant production bottleneck (its stated thesis) yet concludes that LLMs have already crossed the deployment threshold on the basis of BLEU/COMET quality metrics and recommends redirecting effort toward translation quality benchmarks — a structural self-contradiction that a content 'check' should surface.","R1.3":"The headline evidence (4.2 BLEU gain, COMET–human ρ=0.81, fluency ratings) measures general translation quality, not instruction-adherence; whether these results actually support the paper's instruction-following thesis requires evidence-claim alignment scrutiny."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Are you asking for a content/logic review (checking whether the paper's claims are internally consistent and supported by the reported evidence) or a writing/proofreading review (checking grammar, clarity, and sentence quality)?"}

rationale.R1.2: The paper frames instruction-following as the dominant production bottleneck (its stated thesis) yet concludes that LLMs have already crossed the deployment threshold on the basis of BLEU/COMET quality metrics and recommends redirecting effort toward translation quality benchmarks — a structural self-contradiction that a content 'check' should surface.
rationale.R1.3: The headline evidence (4.2 BLEU gain, COMET–human ρ=0.81, fluency ratings) measures general translation quality, not instruction-adherence; whether these results actually support the paper's instruction-following thesis requires evidence-claim alignment scrutiny.

parsed.clarification_question: Are you asking for a content/logic review (checking whether the paper's claims are internally consistent and supported by the reported evidence) or a writing/proofreading review (checking grammar, clarity, and sentence quality)?
